ddls:
CREATE TABLE "professionals" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each professional */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the professional (e.g., estate taxes, medical, properties) */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Availability status of the professional (True or False) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the professional */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the professional */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication and authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for direct contact */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Professional license number for verification */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in the field */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average client rating */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the professional */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Active status of the professional (True or False) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
column_names: Specialty of the professional (e.g., estate taxes, medical, properties)
Availability status of the professional (True or False)
Email address for communication and authentication
Years of experience in the field
Timestamp when the profile was created
Timestamp when the profile was last updated
Active status of the professional (True or False)
